meaning: n.商场,商业中心,大百货商店
examples: Yet Amazon still retains one big advantage: its vast online book emporium.
Yet within just four years the international emporium had collapsed, with catastrophic losses.
photo above: I found this chair in my favorite antique emporium near my family’s cabin in Maine.
Food and wine emporium Peck first opened its doors as a deli in 1883.
The best is an antiques emporium owned by Brian Ramaekers, located on Main Street in Bridgehampton.
